    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static TacletGenerator getInstance()

      • generateAxiomTaclet

        public Taclet generateAxiomTaclet(Name tacletName,
                                  Term originalAxiom,
                                  ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> programVars,
                                  KeYJavaType kjt,
                                  RuleSet ruleSet,
                                  TermServices services)
        Returns a no-find taclet to the passed axiom. If the axiom expression does not contain reference to self, it is considered as if it were static.

      • generateRewriteTaclet

        public Taclet generateRewriteTaclet(Name tacletName,
                                    Term originalFind,
                                    Term originalAxiom,
                                    ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> programVars,
                                    RuleSet ruleSet,
                                    TermServices services)
